request_log_overall.query: SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT session_id), COUNT(DISTINCT ip_hash), MIN(timestamp), MAX(timestamp) FROM request_log

calls_per_session_distribution.query: SELECT bucket, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT session_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(*)=1 THEN '1' WHEN COUNT(*)<=5 THEN '2-5' WHEN COUNT(*)<=20 THEN '6-20' WHEN COUNT(*)<=100 THEN '21-100' ELSE '100+' END AS bucket FROM request_log GROUP BY session_id) b GROUP BY bucket

tool_mix.query: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN verdict='HOLD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM request_log GROUP BY tool_name

top_tool_asset_timeframe.query: SELECT tool_name, asset, timeframe, COUNT(*) FROM request_log GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY 4 DESC

daily_pattern.query: SELECT DATE(timestamp::timestamptz), COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT session_id), COUNT(DISTINCT ip_hash) FROM request_log GROUP BY 1

result._note: zero rows on 2026-04-09, 04-11, 04-13, 04-14, 04-15 — 3-day drought since Apr 12

retention_cohort.query: WITH first_seen AS (SELECT session_id, MIN(ts), MAX(ts) FROM request_log GROUP BY session_id) SELECT COUNT(*) total, SUM(delta>=24h) ret24h, SUM(delta>=7d) ret7d, SUM(delta<1h) one_and_done_1h
retention_cohort.interpretation: 100% of agents are one-and-done within the same hour they started. Zero multi-day agents.

quota_usage.query: SELECT tracker_key, call_count FROM quota_usage ORDER BY call_count DESC
quota_usage.interpretation: Only one row, and it is the internal seed. ZERO real agents have ever been tracked against the 100-call/mo free cap.

http_402_count.method: grep -cE '402|quota.*exceed|Payment Required' in mcp-server container logs since last restart
http_402_count._note: 1 log-line match was the x402 init line 'x402 initialized: network=base-mainnet', not an HTTP response

license_tier_breakdown.query: SELECT license_tier, COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM request_log GROUP BY license_tier

stripe_checkout_summary.interpretation: 47 checkout sessions created via /signup?plan=X redirect, zero ever reached billing-info entry. Every /signup hit creates a new Stripe session (expires in ~24h), so 47 = roughly 47 /signup clicks over 6 days. Distribution is weighted toward Pro+Enterprise (~85% of sessions), not Starter.

x402_on_chain.interpretation: Blockscout confirms: 0 transactions, 0 USDC transfers, 0 unique senders. x402 receiving wallet has never been touched on Base.

npm.interpretation: NPM last-month matches user-provided 1,269 exactly. Last-week of 936 implies ~134/day velocity — accelerating vs the 15/day average for the first half of the window.

github.name: crypto-quant-signal-mcp
github.description: AI trading brain for crypto perps — composite signals, funding rate arb scanning, and market regime detection via MCP

mcp_registry_official._note: Registry exposes no download/view counts — publication count only.

smithery._note: Smithery exposes a '<N> connections' number on its search results page but no public API for it. Second-source verification not possible.
